_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Amrapali Princely Estate
project.address: Plot No. GH-02A, Sector 76, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.description: Amrapali Princely Estate is a massive ready-to-move-in residential society in Sector 76, Noida, successfully completed and managed under the supervision of the Supreme Court Court Receiver and NBCC.
project.long_description: Amrapali Princely Estate is a prominent 15-acre residential development in Sector 76, Noida. Originally launched in 2012 by the Amrapali Group, the project was stalled due to corporate insolvency. Following a landmark 2019 Supreme Court ruling, the project was placed under the authority of the Supreme Court Court Receiver and completed by the state-owned National Buildings Construction Corporation (NBCC). Today, it features 19 towers of G+15 floors, delivering a total of 1,919 spacious apartments amidst 75% open landscaped areas. The society is fully operational and inhabited by hundreds of families. Legally secured by Supreme Court mandates, flat registries are actively executed through a dedicated Court Receiver portal, bypassing the regional developer dues deadlock and offering buyers absolute legal title safety.
marketing_claims: Completed & Delivered by PSU Giant NBCC
Sovereign Legal Security via Supreme Court Court Receiver
Gated Community with Operational Clubhouse and Dance Studio
Just 1 km from Sector 76 Aqua Line Metro
project.project_risk_flag: Court Receiver Managed: Originally built by distressed Amrapali Group. Completed by NBCC. Highly secure via Supreme Court portal.

builder.name: Amrapali Group (NBCC Completed)
builder.company_overview: The Amrapali Group was one of India's largest real estate conglomerates before entering a severe financial collapse and regulatory crackdown. In 2019, the Supreme Court of India cancelled its RERA registrations and land leases, appointing Shri R. Venkataramani as Court Receiver to manage all assets, and tasking the state-run NBCC India with executing the construction of all stalled developments. Today, the Amrapali brand represents a unique judicial wealth-preservation framework, where homebuyers' assets are completed by public-sector engineering giants and legally title-cleared through Supreme Court decrees.

unit_types.description: Efficient single BHK apartment layout complete with separate living room, semi-modular kitchen, toilet, and bedroom balcony. Perfectly suited for single professionals or yield-seeking rental investors.

unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family 2 BHK
unit_types.description: Thoughtfully crafted 2 BHK with cross-ventilated design, a master suite with attached bathroom, spacious drawing-dining area, and two deep balconies with view of landscaping.
whats_included: Granite kitchen slab with steel sink

Vitrified tiling in all other areas
Concealed wiring with multiple TV/Telephone points

assumptions: GST is 0% as the project has received its Completion Certificate and is fully occupied.
All registry fees and outstanding buyer dues must be deposited directly to the UCO Bank Supreme Court Court Receiver account.
Registries bypass developer-Noida Authority debt deadlocks.

payment_plan.notes: Payment executes directly to the Court Receiver's verified UCO Bank account.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Amrapali Princely Estate represents the ultimate defensive value buy in Sector 76, offering large spatial formats at heavily discounted rates with unmatched title security guaranteed by the Supreme Court.
why_buy: Absolute Title Security: Registries are executed directly via Court Receiver NOCs, entirely immune to developer land deadlocks.
PSU Finish Quality: Stalled construction structures were successfully completed and reinforced by engineering giant NBCC.
Affordable Luxury Entry: Priced significantly below non-stalled projects in Sector 76, delivering high carpet-to-price ratios.
why_avoid: Lacks Brand Suffix: Historic association with defaulted Amrapali Group name might keep speculative buyers away.
Standard Common Finishes: Finishes and common lift lobbies are robust but follow government-grade, standardized specifications.
decision_profile.best_for: Affordability-focused end-users and long-term yield investors who prioritize absolute title safety and robust PSU construction over developer name prestige.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term investors or luxury-seeking HNIs who demand high-end private branded concierge setups.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Since the registration is completely protected and executed under Supreme Court Receiver supervision, this project represents one of the lowest legal risks in Noida, despite the developer's default history.

investment_insights.rental_desc: Extremely high rental velocity due to robust nearby market and metro access.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Sovereign Protected Hub
neighborhood_advantages.description: Highly secure, fully operational residential corridor with zero land dues risks.

persona_descriptions.Value-Minded End User: Middle-income corporate nuclear families with school-age kids who prioritize spacious room sizes, physical delivery security, and low entry budgets over developer brand pedigree.
persona_descriptions.High Yield Rent Investors: Investors seeking immediate cash flows through robust rental listings with near-zero legal vacancy delays.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Extremely Conservative — requires 100% delivered, legally clear titles under Court mandate
persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by spacious affordable RTM units, NBCC construction completion safety, and absolute Supreme Court legal registry protections.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Amrapali Princely Estate represents the ultimate value buy in Sector 76. Backed by NBCC completion standards and a Supreme Court protected registry route, it delivers unmatched title security at a highly discounted price.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: For end-users, this project offers large, airy configurations and stable daily life at nearly 30% below the cost of surrounding compliant developments.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Excellent defensive buy for long-term hold. The legal normalization of Court Receiver registries drives steady capital value catch-up.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Highly recommended for families. Operational sports facilities, active children groups, and immediate access to markets and schools make life comfortable.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Outstanding rental generator. Low capital acquisition costs coupled with high demand from local IT professionals yields market-leading rental returns.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Mid-tier standardized specifications finished reliably by NBCC, representing good, robust functional layout standards.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Legally the safest asset category in Noida. Free of Noida Authority land deadlocks, though historically delayed.
walk_away_conditions: Buyers looking for high-end designer Italian marble and private concierge features.
Budget over Rs 2.5 Cr seeking ultra-low density signature towers.
negotiation_leverage: Use the default reputation of the historic developer name to squeeze pricing from individual motivated resale sellers.
Ensure that any seller has cleared their specific dues to the Court Receiver's ledger before executing the transfer agreement.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Buy immediately. Resale inventories are shrinking as the legal route becomes widely verified by top mortgage banks.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Completed and clean society managed by Court Receiver NOCs.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Slightly cheaper per sqft price; larger 15-acre footprint with more open landscaping.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Completely free of historic default branding; private builder maintenance with active bipartite registrations.
competitors.verdict: Sethi Max Royal is better for buyers seeking private builder brands; Amrapali wins on budget, open parks, and sovereign legal protection.
